response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for the song 'Nikkori^^ Chousatai no Theme'. The video includes the full performance followed by an English merchandise talk, a Japanese merchandise talk by the wizard, and an English closing. I have followed the 'Golden Rule' by tying all timestamps strictly to vocal activations, ensuring no 'ghost subtitles' appear during the instrumental outro. English speech is transcribed in both 'og' and 'en' fields, and Japanese segments are translated with attention to character tone and semantic continuity.

subtitles.original: にっこり調査隊 おはこんばんちわ (how are you?)
subtitles.english: Niccori Survey Team! Good morn-evenin-n (how are you?)

subtitles.original: 今日も今日とて 最高です おぉ～わんだほーい！
subtitles.english: Today is also the best, as usual. Oh~ Wonderhoi!

subtitles.original: 探索！コレクション！探求！ E・G・A・O
諸君！
（はい！）
我々は世界の笑顔を調査する！
subtitles.english: We are investigating the world's smiles!

subtitles.original: はい隊長 俺に名案が
subtitles.english: Yes, Captain! I have a great idea!

subtitles.original: 却下
ってまだなにもいってないんだが？
subtitles.english: Wait, you haven't even heard it yet!

subtitles.original: もー とーにーかーく あれだほら
カナブンは一見にしかず？
あぁ 百聞は一見に如かずだねぇ
subtitles.english: Ah, you mean 'seeing is believing', right?

subtitles.original: （それそれ！）
つまり虫取り？！
違うって 隊長！
（なになに～）
提案があります
ぜひ聞かせてほしいものだな
とりあえず
とりあえず？
とりあえず出発しよう ノープランで
subtitles.english: For now, let's set off! No plan!

subtitles.original: うん！
ちょっと待って
え？
出発進行！
ちょっとまってって！ 旅支度くらいさせろ～！
subtitles.english: Wait, I said wait! Let me at least pack!

subtitles.original: 数・日・後
じゃあ持ち物チェックをはじめまーす
subtitles.english: Now, let's start the item check!

subtitles.original: まずは基本の！
ぱ！ ぱぱ パスポート持った？
subtitles.english: Pa! Pa-Pa, did you pack your passport?

subtitles.original: はーい！
き！きき
着替え
わすれた！
え～
も！ モバイルバッテリー 持った？
subtitles.english: Mo! Did you pack your mobile battery?

subtitles.original: はーい
こ！
志はもった？
もちろん！
仲間がいて 私がいる
subtitles.english: There are companions, and I am here too!

subtitles.original: しかもフツー
にっこりこりこりこりお利口ちゃん
陰キャも陽キャも ウェルカム ウェルカム
subtitles.english: Welcome, welcome, whether you're an introvert or an extrovert

subtitles.original: 君の笑顔が調査対象さ
subtitles.english: Your smile is the subject of our investigation

subtitles.original: いいぇーいいぇいいぇい いぇ～
フィジカル メンタル トータルOK
ききめ抜群の エンタ～↓テイメ～ン↑
私だって いつか夢を叶えてやるって
subtitles.english: Even I will make my dreams come true someday!

subtitles.original: (We can do!)
ほら にっこり笑って
subtitles.english: Look, give us a nice smile!

subtitles.original: もっと胸膨らましましたとさ
subtitles.english: And our hearts swelled even more!

subtitles.original: そのしょんぼり にっこりに変換
subtitles.english: Change that sadness into a smile!

subtitles.original: うちらに任せろ You're my smile!
subtitles.english: Leave it to us! You're my smile!

subtitles.original: 晴れの時だって 雨の時だって かきまぜちゃって
subtitles.english: In sunny times, in rainy times, mix it all up,

subtitles.original: スパイスだって 完璧だ！
That's not all! That's right!
You didn't expect this, oh you didn't expect this!
subtitles.english: You didn't expect this, oh you didn't expect this!

subtitles.original: There's 3D merch! Yay!
You too, you watching at home, can own your very own...
subtitles.english: You too, you watching at home, can own your very own...

subtitles.original: Grem Hand In Cushion!
What does that mean? You can put your hands in the Grem!
subtitles.english: What does that mean? You can put your hands in the Grem!

subtitles.original: You can remember all the good times that we had in the Grem Kingdom with Oji-chan! Yay!
subtitles.english: You can remember all the good times that we had in the Grem Kingdom with Oji-chan! Yay!

subtitles.original: And you can do so many things with this Grem, like stick your hands in it, which I said.
subtitles.english: And you can do so many things with this Grem, like stick your hands in it, which I said.

subtitles.original: You can stick your hands in the Grem, and you can sleep on it...
subtitles.english: You can stick your hands in the Grem, and you can sleep on it...

subtitles.original: ...and you can squish it, and you can cherish it, and you can love it!
subtitles.english: ...and you can squish it, and you can cherish it, and you can love it!

subtitles.original: And it's very soft, and very squishy.
subtitles.english: And it's very soft, and very squishy.

subtitles.original: Just watch Oji-chan play with it. Doesn't it look so cool?
subtitles.english: Just watch Oji-chan play with it. Doesn't it look so cool?

subtitles.original: 3Dお披露目グッズの登場じゃー！
ヒャッハー！
見よ！このグレムのもちもちのハンドインクッションじゃよー
subtitles.english: Look! This is Grem's squishy hand-in cushion.

subtitles.original: 超キュート！
いっぱい可愛がっておくれよ
頼んだぞー！
イェーイ！
Thank you everyone for coming to my 3D live today!
subtitles.english: Thank you everyone for coming to my 3D live today!

subtitles.original: I worked really, really hard on it.
subtitles.english: I worked really, really hard on it.

subtitles.original: And thank you to the staff who is, who is overseeing me.
subtitles.english: And thank you to the staff who is, who is overseeing me.

subtitles.original: And thank you for Oji-chan for being here.
subtitles.english: And thank you for Oji-chan for being here.

subtitles.original: And thank you for the Grems, and thank you for Mocha-pi, and Nerissa...
subtitles.english: And thank you for the Grems, and thank you for Mocha-pi, and Nerissa...

subtitles.original: Bae, Biboo, and Justice for being here, a part of my 3D live.
subtitles.english: Bae, Biboo, and Justice for being here, a part of my 3D live.

subtitles.original: This was so much fun!
Oh, it was so awesome!
Oh, thank you!
And I'm looking forward to doing more 3D things for you guys!
subtitles.english: And I'm looking forward to doing more 3D things for you guys!

subtitles.original: Yay! Yippee-ki-yay!
And don't forget, there is more 3D debuts next week!
subtitles.english: And don't forget, there is more 3D debuts next week!

subtitles.original: So make sure you tune in, because all of Justice has been working so hard!
subtitles.english: So make sure you tune in, because all of Justice has been working so hard!

subtitles.original: Okay? Okay!
Bye everyone!
I'll see you later!
Bye-bye!
